commands.name: sheets
commands.description: List a workbook's sheets with shape + header preview. Start here for an .xlsx/.xls.

commands.name: schema
commands.description: Infer a tabular schema: columns, dtypes, and a dimension/measure split - the columns you can group by vs aggregate.

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Profile each column: nulls, uniques, numeric stats, and top categorical values - the shape of the data.

commands.name: sample
commands.description: Sample rows from a sheet (head, or --random) as records - see real values, never dump the whole sheet.

commands.name: aggregate
commands.description: Group by a dimension and aggregate measures - the analysis the dataset supports. --by and --measure are required and repeatable.
